indication: INLURIYO is an estrogen receptor antagonist indicated for treatment of adults with ER-positive, HER2-negative, ESR1-mutated advanced or metastatic breast cancer with disease progression following at least one line of endocrine therapy.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) granted approval to imlunestrant for the treatment of adult patients with ER-positive, HER2-negative, ESR1-mutated advanced or metastatic breast cancer with disease progression following at least one line of endocrine therapy.

document.name: Inluriyo (imlunestrant) [package insert]. FDA.
